problem id: d3c6596e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  01101101 -> 10110110
  10111000 -> 01011100
  01111000 -> 00111100
  10110110 -> 01011011
  11000100 -> 01100010
  00111000 -> 00011100
  00010100 -> 00001010
  10011110 -> 01001111
  10110001 -> 11011000
  00101101 -> 10010110

query: 01110101
predicted answer: 10111010
